hooks.command:
bash -c 'BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$BRANCH" != "main" ] && [ "$BRANCH" != "develop" ] && [ "$BRANCH" != "HEAD" ]; then mkdir -p .sessions && echo "---
session_end: $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)
branch: $BRANCH
author: $(git config user.name)
commits_since_base: $(git log --oneline develop..$BRANCH 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d " ")
files_changed: $(git diff develop..$BRANCH --name-only 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d " ")
---" > ".sessions/$(git config user.name | tr " " "-" | tr "[:upper:]" "[:lower:]")-$(date +%Y%m%d)-$BRANCH.meta"; fi'

Stop.description: Auto-track session metadata when Claude Code session ends on a feature branch
